sentences.english: My family goes to the beach every summer.
We swim in the ocean and build sandcastles.
I like to collect seashells along the shore.
sentences.korean: 해안가를 따라 조개를 모으는 걸 좋아해요.

sentences.english: My favorite part is watching the sunset over the water.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 부분은 물 위로 지는 석양을 보는 거예요.

sentences.english: The beach always makes me feel happy and relaxed.
